# Sentinel Evidence

Evidence must map to the approved test plan, relevant acceptance criteria, and DoD. Record commands or manual actions actually executed, concise observed results, and failures or omissions. Never claim execution that did not occur; “tests passed” alone is insufficient.

Separate mandatory, recommended, optional, and manual validation. Missing mandatory evidence blocks validation. Keep handoffs and close inputs concise: no full diffs, long logs, repeated contracts, or execution history.

Validator verifies evidence and path adherence without editing. Reviewer evaluates the current slice delta after validator passes. Finalizer consolidates their results without revalidating.
